title: Bedrock to Deepslate
description: Changes the bedrock block model to the deepslate model (texture pack compatible)
body:
Replaces bedrock's model for deepslate, preventing coordinate leaks from bedrock patterns.

This texture pack is also compatible with any other texture packs as it only chages the bedrock model. (make sure it is near the top to ensure that the models are changed correctly)



Default minecraft textures:

![default minecraft textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb86b2d6a2835729db56780384f5d8c209b1f610.png)


Default minecraft textures with model replaced:

![default minecraft textures with model replaced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fff73276ddc1d071a8310f06aa8f75417f6f0c2c.png)


[MS Painted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ms-painted) texture pack with model replaced:

![ms painted texture pack with model replaced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0dc6a2ee99343745651931f798ac498b991b9e3.png)




(inspired by [this pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bedrock-is-stone))
